data.title: USDC on Algorand can now be used by Kraken customers for deposits and withdrawals, offering fast, low-cost transactions.
data.description: Expansion of access to quick, cost-effective digital dollar transactions on Algorand has been facilitated through integration. As of January 22, 2026, Kraken customers can utilize USDC on Algorand for deposits and withdrawals. This integration allows for seamless transactions of USDC on the Algorand blockchain through the Kraken exchange.

data.title: New episode of White House 1600 Sessions Podcast features discussion on the creation of the White House Christmas Ornament with 45-year tradition. Washington, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: Stewart McLaurin, President of the White House Historical Association, recently held a discussion with Hamilton Davison, CEO of ChemArt, and former ChemArt President Dave Marquis about the establishment of a holiday tradition that has been ongoing for 45 years. The conversation took place in Washington on January 22, 2026. The details were shared following a press release by the White House Historical Association.

data.title: Shrub Oak International School honors HR Director Heather Bermingham for fostering positive staff culture.
data.description: In Mohegan Lake, New York, on January 22, 2026, Shrub Oak International School is praising Heather Bermingham, who holds an MBA and serves as the Director of Human Resources. Bermingham is being commended for her efforts in promoting a "people-first" culture within the institution. This initiative aligns with Shrub Oak's objective of enhancing the well-being of autistic children.

data.title: CrossCountry Mortgage is now the top retail mortgage lender in the nation, finishing 2025 with record growth and achievements.
data.description: In January 22, 2026, in Cleveland, CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM), the leading retail mortgage lender in the United States, concluded 2025 with remarkable achievements, showcasing significant growth, increased community involvement, and ongoing industry acclaim. The company set new records and gained substantial momentum throughout the year.

data.title: Freedom Bank appoints Pierre A. Abushacra to its Board of Directors; brings experience in commercial real estate. (Characters: 98)
data.description: An entrepreneur with expertise in operations and commercial real estate, Pierre A. Abushacra, has joined the board of directors of Freedom Financial Holdings, Inc. (OTCQX: FDVA). The appointment was made on January 22, 2026. Abushacra's addition to the board brings valuable experience and insights to Freedom Bank.

data.title: Inventor from Calif. creates GRIP CINCINNO for vending machine security, a versatile and strong lock mechanism.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 22, 2026, an inventor from Tarzana, California, shared his motivation behind creating the GRIP CINCINNO, a vending machine security upgrade. The inventor aimed to enhance security measures to curb theft incidents. The versatile design of GRIP CINCINNO is fully adjustable and can be customized according to various needs.

data.title: Leopard Imaging unveils 2 high-res MIPI camera modules for smart devices and vision apps in 2026.
data.description: In Fremont, California on January 22, 2026, Leopard Imaging Inc. will introduce two new compact high-resolution MIPI camera modules - the LI-OG12B10-MIPI-AF-95D V1.0 and LI-IMX681-MIPI-AF-96D. These modules are part of the company's innovative offerings in embedded vision and AI camera technology.

data.title: WFF appoints Kelli Valade as President & CEO to develop industry leaders. Dallas, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: Experienced CEO appointed to head nonprofit organization focused on cultivating future leaders in the foodservice sector, based in Dallas. On January 22, 2026, WFF, renowned for its efforts in leadership development within the industry, revealed that after a thorough selection process, a new leader will take the helm.

data.title: Cinch Home Services adds digital leader Kristine Miller to board of advisors, with over 20 years of experience.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Boca Raton, Florida, Cinch Home Services revealed the addition of Kristine (Kris) Miller to its Board of Advisors. Miller, a seasoned expert in digital strategies and transformations, brings over twenty years of experience to the role. This appointment reflects Cinch's commitment to tapping top talent for shaping its future direction.

data.title: Ink Films releases DJ Ahmet trailer, Sundance-winning debut feature, early 2026 US theatrical release. Las Vegas, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: Check out the official trailer for DJ Ahmet, the debut feature film from Macedonian filmmaker Georgi M. Unkovski that won at Sundance. Released by Ink Films, a part of The Beverly Theater, the trailer dropped on Jan. 22, 2026. The film showcases the story of DJ Ahmet and has been making waves in the industry.

data.title: Aaron Wise rejoins Guaranteed Rate Affinity as The Wise Team. A notable figure in Chicago's mortgage market.
data.description: Chicago, on Jan. 22, 2026-- Today, Guaranteed Rate Affinity disclosed the return of Aaron Wise to the company, where he will be heading The Wise Team. Aaron Wise, a renowned mortgage professional in the Chicago area, is set to bring his expertise to the table once again after rejoining the leading mortgage provider.

data.title: Target adds top executives from Nike and HanesBrands to board, reaffirms commitment to shareholders with new dividend.
data.description: On Wednesday, Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) announced the addition of John Hoke, III, a former design leader at Nike, Inc. (NYSE: NKE), to its board. This move aims to enhance innovation and value as the company gears up for its next phase of growth. Additionally, Target reaffirmed its commitment to shareholders by declaring a new dividend. Hoke, with over 30 years of experience, and Steve Bratspies, another appointee, join the board to support the company's strategic objectives. This news indicates Target's proactive approach towards driving growth and strengthening its leadership team. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Arbor Scientia Group offers new online courses aiding pharmaceutical clients with improved learning outcomes.
data.description: Arbor Scientia Group is currently supporting clients with a cutting-edge online program aimed at enhancing educational quality. This course model, created to enhance engagement, retention, and practical application in numerous disease areas, is making waves. Situated in CARLSBAD, Calif., the group introduced this initiative on Jan. 22, 2026.

data.title: Jim Beam and Kenan Thompson offer exclusive kit for fans to turn lemons into Jim Beam & Lemonade, refresh fandom.
data.description: In Clermont, Kentucky, on January 22, 2026, Jim Beam, the leading bourbon globally, has revived a tradition for fans coping with defeats and seeking to enhance their enjoyment of the postseason stress-free. As part of this initiative, the company aims to provide a renewed fan experience amid the football playoffs.

data.title: OneDigital promotes Bill Carew to President and Camry Blaising to COO; focus on growth and operations.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 22, 2026, OneDigital, a prominent insurance brokerage, financial services, and HR consulting firm, revealed the appointments of Bill Carew as President and Camry Blaising as Chief Operating Officer. Carew's promotion to President and Blaising's appointment as COO signify the company's strategic leadership changes as they continue to strengthen their presence in the industry. These appointments reflect the company's commitment to growth and innovation under Carew and Blaising's leadership.

data.title: Bybit, 2nd largest crypto exchange, releases report on impact of geopolitical tension & interest rate shocks on market.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on January 22, 2026, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally, Bybit, unveiled its newest Bybit x Block Scholes Crypto Derivatives Analytics report. This report delves into the impact of recent geopolitical events and interest rate fluctuations on risk sentiment.

data.title: Jennifer Matarangas-King sworn in as USVI Commissioner of Tourism on Jan 15 at Government House in St. Croix.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Jennifer Matarangas-King became the new Commissioner of the U.S. Virgin Islands Department of Tourism in a ceremony at Government House in St. Croix. The event marked her official swearing-in to the position.
